dialogue.message: Malformed dialogue line object: duplicate 'character' key, invalid 'id' value ('player' instead of a unique dialogue id), and an unexpected 'id2' field with null value. This will likely break JSON parsing/rendering of this line or cause it to silently fail to display. — Suggested fix: Remove the duplicate 'character' key and the extraneous 'id2' field. Assign a proper unique id following the established pattern (e.g., 'ba-d-2') consistent with sibling lines ba-d-1 and ba-d-3.
